name: Staff of Withering
description:
This staff has 3 charges and regains {@dice 1d3} expended charges daily at dawn.
The staff can be wielded as a magic Quarterstaff. On a hit, it deals damage as a normal Quarterstaff , and you can expend 1 charge to deal an extra {@damage 2d10} Necrotic damage to the target and force it to make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} for 1 hour on any ability check or saving throw that uses Strength or Constitution.
